description_long: This is a matte black insulated water bottle with a wide cylindrical body and a robust, screw-on lid. The lid features an integrated handle for easy carrying and a flip-up straw spout for convenient drinking. The bottle appears to be made of stainless steel with a powder-coated finish, giving it a modern and durable look suitable for urban environments. A small, white logo is visible near the base, adding a subtle branding element. The overall design is sleek and functional, with smooth contours and a sturdy build. The bottle is likely double-walled for insulation, keeping beverages hot or cold for extended periods.
description: A matte black insulated water bottle with a handle, flip-up straw spout, and subtle white logo near the base. The design is sleek, modern, and durable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bottle's cylindrical body, screw-on lid, and integrated handle with the spout closed.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the flip-up straw spout in the open position and the ergonomic handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the open straw spout, with the bottle's body fully visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the profile of the handle and straw spout, emphasizing the bottle's smooth, matte finish.
attribute_label_or_branding: A small, white logo is present near the base of the bottle.
